created_by_slice: P88 Wayback/CDX/Memento Connector Runtime Planning v0
worktree_status: P88 artifacts generated after initial clean inspection.
runtime_boundary: P88 is planning-only. It does not implement the Wayback/CDX/Memento connector runtime, does not call Wayback, CDX, Memento, Internet Archive, or archive.org endpoints, does not fetch archived pages, does not replay captures, does not download WARC records, does not run source sync jobs, does not write source-cache or evidence-ledger records, does not wire public search to live calls, does not enable arbitrary URL fetch, downloads, mirroring, screenshots, credentials, or telemetry, and does not mutate public, local, runtime, candidate, source-cache, evidence-ledger, or master indexes.
connector_runtime_architecture_plan: future client.py bounded availability/capture metadata client
future normalize.py source-cache capture summary normalizer
future evidence.py evidence observation candidate builder
source_sync_job_flow: source policy guard checks connector approval
URI-R privacy guard validates approved source
bounded failure record without raw payload
uri_review_normalization_plan: Allowed future URI sources are reviewed source records, reviewed search needs, source pack records, manual observation records, and fixture examples. Raw public query parameters, private URLs, credentialed URLs, localhost URLs, file URLs, data URLs, javascript URLs, uploaded files, and local paths are forbidden.
validation_normalization_plan: Validate response shape, URI-R, capture timestamps, status codes, MIME types, digest summaries, duplicate captures, nearest captures, time-map summaries, source attribution, error envelopes, raw payload exclusion, archived content exclusion, and private URI redaction.
failure_retry_timeout_circuit_breaker_pl: Timeouts, bounded retries, retry-after/backoff, per-source rate limits, circuit breaker, no retry storms, no public-search blocking, no raw error leaks, and operator-visible summaries are required.
public_search_boundary: Public search must not call Wayback/CDX/Memento live or accept arbitrary URL/URI-R parameters for live fetch; future cards may only read reviewed public-safe summaries after separate runtime and review.
privacy_rights_risk_review: Metadata-only with URI privacy review; no archived content fetch, capture replay, WARC download, screenshots, downloads, mirroring, install, execute, credentials, private account access, rights clearance claim, malware safety claim, or archived content safety claim.
security_abuse_review: Rate limits, timeout, circuit breaker, User-Agent/contact, cache requirement, kill switch, no public fanout, URI privacy guard, source policy guard, and operator approval are required.

initial_inspection.summary: P72 approval pack and contracts were present; connector_approved_now is false; URI privacy, source policy, and operator values are pending.

p88_plan_validation.summary: P88 validator and tests passed; readiness remains blocked_connector_approval_pending.

approval_and_ingestion_contracts.summary: Existing Wayback/CDX/Memento approval, IA runtime plan, source sync, source cache, and evidence ledger contracts remained valid and contract-only.

public_search_static_and_safety.summary: Local public-search safety/static lanes passed. No public-search runtime fanout or Wayback/CDX/Memento connector behavior was added.

hosted_deployment_and_baseline.summary: Hosted backend remains not configured, static route verification remains failed, and Manual Observation Batch 0 remains 0 observed / 39 pending.

evals_and_full_tests.summary: Archive evals passed 6/6. Search usefulness remains 64 queries with capability_gap=7, covered=5, partial=40, source_gap=10, unknown=2. Full Python/unit/boundary/diff lanes passed.

optional.summary: Optional gh and cargo commands were unavailable because the executables are not installed.

remaining_blockers: URI privacy policy review is pending.
Wayback/CDX/Memento source policy review is pending.
Rate-limit, timeout, retry, and circuit-breaker values are pending.
Source sync worker execution, source-cache runtime, and evidence-ledger runtime remain future.
Hosted deployment remains unverified for future public integration.
next_recommended_branch: P89 GitHub Releases Connector Runtime Planning v0 only after approval
notes: No Wayback, CDX, Memento, Internet Archive, archive.org, or other source calls were made.
